items.user_turn: Please turn that refined minimalist 7-day winter Europe packing list into a final carry-on-only plan: an itemized packing checklist ordered by priority, a day-by-day outfit matrix using layering and mix-and-match pieces, a TSA-compliant liquids/tech/battery plan, a laundry strategy for mid-trip refreshes, and tweaks tied to my travel dates, flights, and medical gear constraints. My trip is December 18–24, 2026; outbound BA178 departs LAX at 4:30 PM on December 18 to LHR (direct) and return BA179 departs LHR at noon on December 24 to LAX (direct). I have Type 1 diabetes — I use an Omnipod insulin pump, will carry a backup rapid-acting insulin vial plus spare infusion sets, and need to keep these in the cabin with a doctor’s prescription note. I prefer a neutral color palette and a casual‑smart look, and assume my accommodations won't have a washer/dryer unless I tell you otherwise.

items.user_turn: I need a detailed day-by-day arrival and contingency transit plan for my Gion Matsuri visit that matches my booked lodging and arrival times, minimizes time in crowds, lists alternative routes and transit options with estimated durations, and includes packing, medical, and luggage-handling recommendations. My flights are JL123 arriving Kansai (KIX) at 16:30 JST and JL128 departing Kansai (KIX) at 10:00 JST. Lodging: reservation GION-RES-872104 at Gion Guesthouse Komorebi, 10 Gionmachi Minamigawa, Higashiyama-ku, Kyoto 605-0074 — host +81-75-541-0001. Medical/mobility: I have Type 1 diabetes and use an insulin pump (need refrigeration access and roughly three daily doses), I have a severe shellfish allergy and carry an epinephrine auto-injector, and I can walk moderate distances but prefer to limit continuous walking to under 30 minutes. Please give arrival transfer options from KIX, luggage suggestions, times to visit parade sites to avoid the densest crowds, contingency routes (trains/taxis) with durations, and medical handling (where to store/refrigerate pump supplies, best local pharmacy/clinic options).
